scripts.build:all: npm run build:blog && npm run build:admin
scripts.deploy:blog: node scripts/sync-secrets.js apps/blog sveltekitblogblog && npm run build:blog && cd apps/blog && npx wrangler pages deploy .svelte-kit/cloudflare --project-name sveltekitblogblog
scripts.deploy:admin: node scripts/sync-secrets.js apps/admin sveltekitblogadmin && npm run build:admin && cd apps/admin && npx wrangler pages deploy .svelte-kit/cloudflare --project-name sveltekitblogadmin
